rules: Header remains visible on every route and contains the global search field.
Connection status stays discoverable at every breakpoint.
Sidebar converts to overlay navigation on mobile instead of shrinking below tap-target size.
Footer remains below main content and never overlaps fixed action bars.

placement: KPI row spans full width above the four panels.
Coverage and progress occupy the first content row on desktop.
Graph and gap analysis occupy the second content row on desktop.
Gap create side panel opens from the right on desktop and tablet, and becomes a full-screen overlay on mobile.
Board view switcher anchors the top-left of the content region.
PI Planning sandbox sits above ROAM and confidence vote when active.
Escalation drawer opens from the right on desktop and tablet, full-screen on mobile.
Sticky vote or approval actions align to the bottom edge on tablet and mobile.
Approval queue appears before detailed evidence.
Aggregate evidence keeps the five evidence streams in a consistent vertical order on narrow screens.
Approve and Reject remain visible without hiding evidence context.
Manual override stays visually separated from primary approve action.
Doc tree remains fixed on desktop while content scrolls independently.
Breadcrumb sits above the content body and below document-level actions.
Coverage indicator stays near the top of the content panel for PRD documents.
Open in Trace Explorer action remains adjacent to detected beads links on all breakpoints.
Toolbar occupies the full width above the graph canvas.
Legend remains anchored below or within the canvas without obscuring nodes.
Node detail panel preserves enough space for coverage, linked entities, and actions.
Footer metrics appear below the graph region and remain visible after zoom interactions.
Back link and task identity anchor the header before editable fields.
Editable fields form a compact summary row on desktop and stack on smaller viewports.
RTE context block appears beneath core summary data whenever rte_status is approved or escalated.
Graph tab keeps a clear Open Full Page action aligned with the mini graph widget.
Search bar spans the content width above counts and grouped results.
Filter panel precedes result groups in DOM order for keyboard users.
Grouped results maintain type headings even when only one group is present.
Snippet highlights must not shift line-height enough to break scanability.
Board/List toggle and filters remain above the table or list presentation.
CSV export stays aligned with filters but separated from destructive or bulk actions.
Pagination remains below the current result set and above the bulk action bar.
Selected row count is always visible whenever the bulk action bar is present.

shared_rules: Use skeleton loaders that mimic the final layout instead of circular spinners for loading-dominant surfaces.
Do not rely on color alone for severity, status, or approval outcomes.
All drawers and overlays convert to bottom-sheet or full-screen patterns on narrower breakpoints.
Primary actions stay within thumb reach on mobile when the screen requires completion steps.
Scrollable regions need clear ownership: one primary scroll container per route at mobile sizes.
